problem: Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear
mechanism: Electromagnetic induction in moving biological tissue
hypothesis: If Electromagnetic induction in moving biological tissue is applied to ionic, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Bench-top proof of concept with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
